chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3746 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ HEARING (PRIORITY) CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.22446/2025. 2. For order on Nazir Report dated 27.01.2025. 3. For hearing of CMA No.19724/2025. 4. For hearing of CMA No.339/2025. 5. For hearing of CMA No.16299/2024. 6. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 11th November 2025 Mr. Basil Nabi Malik, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Waleed Khanzada, Advocate for KW&SC. Syed Ali Ahmed Zaidi, Advocate for Intervenor. Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, Asst. A.G. Sindh. -*-*-*-*-*- Learned counsel for petitioner does not press this petition, stating that the grievance of petitioner has been redressed. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
